MELItem.Title: APU Air Inlet Door Actuation System

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative with door in any position provided:

ListItem.Para: Left AGCU operates normally.
VFSG systems operate normally.
EDTO beyond 180 minutes is not conducted.

MaintenanceNote.Para: A VFSG system is considered to be operating normally if its associated status message (ELEC GEN SYS L1, L2, R1 or R2) is not displayed.

ListItem.Para: Reduce performance limited weights as follows for APU inlet door not closed with APU not running:

Note.Para: The enroute climb weight penalties are based on single engine operating speeds that approximate maximum lift-to-drag ratio speed. To account for the difference in level-off altitude when operating at other speeds, multiply the enroute climb weight penalty listed above by the appropriate factor listed on page 3.00-01-00.2 in the ENROUTE DIVERSION SPEED EFFECTS paragraph.

ListItem.Para: For APU inlet door not closed with APU not running, increase flight planning fuel by either using an airplane drag correction factor of 2.5% or increase the flight planning fuel by 2.9%.
Flight must remain within 180 minutes of landing at a suitable airport.
Start the first engine using the Ground Power Engine Start Supplementary Procedure.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided door is deactivated in the inflight open position.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Manually position and deactivate the door in the inflight open position (AMM DDG 49-15-01).

ListItem.Para: Set P5 panel APU selector OFF.
Open the P49 panel APUC-1 circuit breaker.
Open the P300 panel FIRE EXT BOTTLE-APU and APU REMOTE FIRE IND AUTO DISCH ARM circuit breakers.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker APU DC PUMP and lock with an INOP tag.
Open and collar the P49 panel ACTR-APU INLET DR circuit breaker.
Gain access to the inlet door actuator.
Turn the transfer flag socket counter clockwise until the manual drive socket shows.
Turn the manual drive socket counter clockwise until the torque value suddenly increases.
Turn the manual drive socket clockwise approximately 7.5 turns.
Turn the transfer flag socket clockwise until E shows.
Close the P49 panel APUC-1 circuit breaker.
Close the P300 panel FIRE EXT BOTTLE-APU and APU REMOTE FIRE IND AUTO DISCH ARM circuit breakers.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, close circuit breaker APU DC PUMP.
Reduce performance limited weights as follows for APU inlet door fully open with APU not running:

Note.Para: The enroute climb weight penalties are based on single engine operating speeds that approximate maximum lift-to-drag ratio speed. To account for the difference in level-off altitude when operating at other speeds, multiply the enroute climb weight penalty listed above by the appropriate factor listed on page 3.00-01-00.2 in the ENROUTE DIVERSION SPEED EFFECTS paragraph.

ListItem.Para: For APU inlet door not closed with APU not running, increase flight planning fuel by either using an airplane drag correction factor of 2.5% or increase the flight planning fuel by 2.9%.

For APU inlet door not closed with APU running, increase flight planning fuel by either using an airplane drag correction factor of 1.0% or increase the flight planning fuel by 1.2% plus 250 lb/hr of APU flight time and 480 lb/hr of APU ground time.

MELSubItem.Title: APU Air Inlet Door Actuator Position Indication Switch

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided APU inlet door is verified to operate normally before each departure.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the APU door operates normally before each departure (AMM DDG 49-15-01).

ListItem.Para: For APU off:
On APU maintenance page, confirm the APU DOOR POSITION indicates CLOSED.
Set Electrical Panel (P5) APU selector ON.
Wait 120 seconds and on APU maintenance page, confirm APU DOOR POSITION indicates OPEN.
Set Electrical Panel (P5) APU selector OFF.
Wait 120 seconds and on APU maintenance page, confirm APU DOOR POSITION indicates CLOSED.
For APU on:
On APU maintenance page, confirm the APU DOOR POSITION indicates OPEN.
Set Electrical Panel (P5) APU selector OFF.
Wait 120 seconds and on APU maintenance page, confirm APU DOOR POSITION indicates CLOSED.
Start the APU.
Wait 120 seconds and on APU maintenance page, confirm APU DOOR POSITION indicates OPEN.
